title: Minecraft HD(64x) Outline Armor Add-On
description: This is an add-on for the Minecraft HD (64x) resource pack, featuring invisible armor (except a small outline).
body:
Do you want to still show off your Minecraft skin, while wearing your full armor for protection? Some mods make armor invisible, but that means you can't see when mobs are wearing armor - particularly annoying when you're heading back to your death point, only to find that baby zombie wearing your netherite armor!

This resource pack is an add-on for the [Minecraft HD(64x)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-hd(64x)-fan-updated-by-mrdhobbs) resource pack, making armor textures transparent, except for a small outline.

This pack does not need a mod like Optifine or Continuity to work - it will work fine with the vanilla (unmodded) client.
